variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11761 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11761 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11761 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 178.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 152.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 92.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 392.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 382.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 355.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P776158 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11761
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P776158 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11761
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P776158 Air Filter, Primary Konepac is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary konepac applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1811 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11761
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1811 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11761
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1811 premium axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
